verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Anointing fall on me Anointing fall on me Let the power Of the Holy Ghost Fall on me Anointing fall on me

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Touch my hands, my mouth and my heart Fill my life Lord every part Let the power of the Holy Ghost Fall on me anointing fall on me

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: On me let the power Of the Holy Ghost fall on me Anointing fall on me anointing fall on me
